title: WE NEED TO TALK ABOUT THIS
description:
Jeremy has strong words for NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani and other local leaders for allegedly deflecting blame onto conservative protesters, such as Jake Lang, rather than condemning the radical ideology behind a recent explosive device attack at Gracie Mansion.

#NYCMayor #ZohranMamdani #PoliticalCommentary #JakeLang #GracieMansion #ReactionVideo #NYCPolitics #CultureWar #NewsCommentary
